title: hypericum virginicum var. walteri
intro: Hypericum virginicum var. walteri, also known as St. Andrew's Cross or Walter's St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hypericum virginicum var. walteri include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
